Who I Am

Not a drag-and-drop developer. A store architect.

I treat every Shopify store as a complete technical ecosystem — not a set of blocks to rearrange. With 15 years in the craft and 190+ stores delivered, I know exactly how to change what matters without touching what works.

My Approach

Four steps. Zero disruption.

Every change to timeentwined.com will be made on a duplicate theme — your live store never goes dark during edits. You preview, approve, then we push live.

1

Theme Audit

I map every color variable, font stack, and section block before touching anything. This reveals what's hardcoded vs. theme-controlled — preventing surprises later.

2

Duplicate Theme

All edits happen on a copy. Your live store stays exactly as-is while we work — no risk of your customers ever seeing a broken state.

3

Color & Copy Changes

Palette updates, text refinements, section tweaks — applied cleanly via CSS variables and Shopify's theme editor, keeping the codebase easy to maintain after handoff.

4

Preview → Approve → Publish

You review the duplicate theme on a preview link. When you're happy, one click publishes. I stay on for 60 days to catch anything post-launch.

Discovery Question

"Are you looking to stay within your current theme's built-in settings — no code — or are you open to small custom CSS edits for more precise control over colors and type? It changes how far we can push the look without risking your layout."

The Proposal

A letter written for you.

timeentwined.com caught my eye — before touching a single color or line of copy, quick question: are you looking to stay within your current theme's settings (no code), or are you open to small custom CSS edits for more precise control? It changes how far we can push the visual changes without risking your layout.

Either way, here's my approach: I'd audit your live theme first, map every color variable and font stack, then make all edits on a duplicate theme so your store never goes offline mid-update. You preview, approve, we push live.

I've done this exact type of work on stores like fieracosmetics.com and jungmaven.com — both needed brand-aligned color and typography updates without touching core functionality. Clean, fast, zero disruption.

With 190+ Shopify projects delivered and 15 years in the ecosystem, this scope is well within a 3–5 day turnaround for you.

Reply with 2–3 specific changes you have in mind (colors, fonts, sections) and I'll send a quick plan the same day.
